title: Nanaimo (British Columbia) - Canada.ca
content:
## Nanaimo British Columbia

## Nanaimo British Columbia
Nanaimo is a coastal city on Vancouver Island, in British Columbia. It is known for its spectacular landscapes, surrounded by mountains and forests, and stretching along the ocean. Nicknamed the “Harbour City,” it is a true maritime hub that offers ideal access to surrounding islands. Nanaimo stands out through its rich cultural heritage, with museums, festivals and a thriving arts scene, thereby offering the perfect balance between nature and culture. The Francophone community is warm and inclusive and plays an essential role in creating a space for exchange and celebration of Francophone cultural diversity.
